text:
Maybe there was a boy named Bob who loved bees.

One summer Bob spent his days roaming fields trying to catch glimpses of honey bees. He knew where to look. He knew some flowers had plenty.

One day while dancing barefoot among grass blades he spotted something small buzzing and buzzing. Bob froze then looked up. There were thousands! Honey bees! Bob smiled eagerly.

He scooped up some grass clippings and held them out his hand. Bob waved them slowly then they joined the swarm.

One bee buzzed closer Bob bent down. It got nearer and then landed on his finger.

Bob smiled more and Bob smiled even more.

That night Bob wrote: Bob loves bees.
